steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task is to emphasize the size of the crater. The relevant facts are the specific diameter (3.5 km) and the word "massive." The best choice makes the crater's scale the central point of the sentence.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — When a large object struck what is now Ukraine around 80 million years ago, it created Zeleny Gai, a massive crater measuring 3.5 km in diameter.: The appositive "a massive crater measuring 3.5 km in diameter" directly highlights scale with both a size adjective and the specific measurement. ✓
  • Choice B — Long ago, a crater now known as Zeleny Gai was created when a large object collided with Earth.: Omits the 3.5 km measurement entirely; says nothing about size. ✗
  • Choice C — Researchers have investigated the formation of Zeleny Gai, an ancient impact crater measuring 3.5 km in diameter located in Ukraine.: Includes the measurement but the sentence focuses on researchers, not the crater's size. ✗
  • Choice D — Impact craters, like Zeleny Gai in Ukraine, are formed when a massive object collides with Earth, creating depressions in the land.: Focuses on how craters form in general; omits Zeleny Gai's specific diameter. ✗
That is the correct answer.
